note: Enhanced PR Freelance pipeline scrape — 4 fresh leads across financial-PR agency overflow (Dukas Linden / Infinite, Method Communications, M Booth) and an in-house interim pitch at a fintech (Tide). Dedup checked against daily-scrape-* and pr-freelance-scrape-* through 2026-05-18. Quality-over-quantity selection: every lead clears 55+ combined and is supported by a real, currently-open requisition or freshly-announced corporate transaction.

leads.name: Dukas Linden Public Relations
leads.industry: Financial Communications Agency (asset & wealth management, capital markets, fintech, blockchain/crypto, professional services)
leads.compensationText: Not disclosed (typical agency overflow: $125-$175/hr or $8-15K/mo retainer for senior fintech/crypto media counsel)
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Full-time req (Crypto/Fintech Media Relations Specialist) — pitch as freelance/interim during integration

contacts.name: Seth Linden
contacts.title: President, DLPR (now senior role within Infinite platform)

contacts.name: Dukas Linden — Head of Talent / Recruiting
contacts.title: Recruiter, Media Relations

leads.notes: TOP LEAD this run (combined 80, A). Dukas Linden is the #1 fit on the entire scrape: financial-PR agency representing asset/wealth managers, capital-markets clients, fintechs and blockchain/crypto firms — i.e. Mark's exact wheelhouse. They were just acquired by Infinite (ParkSouth-backed) on May 6, 2026, and Seth Linden is now a senior leader in the integrated platform. Newly-integrated PR firms predictably overspend in the 60-90 days after close: client onboarding into the new Infinite footprint, plus an open crypto/fintech media relations specialist req still live on LinkedIn = overflow window. ACTION: Don't apply to the FT specialist req; instead, send a direct LinkedIn note to Seth Linden positioning Mark as a senior freelance media counselor available for integration-period overflow, with explicit list of 3-4 sample fintech/crypto pitch angles he could land in week one. Follow with a second outbound to Infinite's NY/EMEA Comms partners 7 days later. Worst case: get on the agency's freelance bench at $125-175/hr.

leads.name: Method Communications
leads.industry: Integrated PR Agency (fintech, B2B tech, consumer tech, AI)
leads.location: New York, NY (HQ Salt Lake City + NYC + SF)
leads.compensationText: Not disclosed (typical mid-tier agency VP comp $185-$240K FT, freelance VP overflow $135-185/hr)
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Full-time (VP, Fintech Public Relations) — pitch as freelance VP for overflow

contacts.name: Method Communications — Head of Fintech Practice
contacts.title: Practice Lead / SVP Fintech (hiring manager)

leads.notes: Combined 60, B grade. Method is a mid-sized integrated PR agency with a dedicated fintech practice (plus B2B tech, consumer tech, AI). They've had a VP, Fintech Public Relations req open since early April; six weeks of recruitment is the classic mid-funnel point where agencies absorb a senior freelancer to keep the practice billing while they finish the search. ACTION: Email join@methodcommunications.com referencing the open VP fintech req and pitching senior freelance overflow at a stated rate ($150-175/hr or $15-22K/mo retainer for 60-80 hrs). Parallel LinkedIn note to the fintech practice lead with three specific story angles he could pitch their existing book in week one.

leads.name: M Booth
leads.industry: Integrated PR Agency (Corporate Affairs, B2B, Tech, Consumer, Health)
leads.location: New York, NY (remote from 21 US states + DC)
leads.fundingStage: Established mid-large PR agency (~40 yrs, part of NEXT15 holding company)
leads.compensationText: Posted salary band $136,000-$165,000 (FT). Freelance VP overflow benchmark $125-175/hr
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Full-time (VP, Earned Media Strategy — Corporate Affairs/B2B). Remote-eligible from 21 states. Pitchable as interim while search runs.

contacts.name: Jeremy Mullman
contacts.title: Head of Media Relations (recently joined to lead the practice this req sits in)

leads.notes: Combined 65, B grade. M Booth's open VP, Earned Media Strategy (Corporate Affairs/B2B) req is one of the cleanest matches Mark will see all month: corporate storytelling, executive media training, thought leadership, GEO/SEO integration, B2B/tech/professional services — every line of the JD reads like his resume. Jeremy Mullman recently joined to lead media relations and is actively building the practice (active buildout = overflow demand). Remote-eligible from 21 states means it's not gated to NYC residency. ACTION: Apply directly via the PR Net link (lowest-friction apply path), then send Jeremy Mullman a LinkedIn note within 48 hours referencing the application and offering an immediate 60-day interim engagement to cover marquee client work while the FT search runs. Salary band ($136-165K) is below Mark's senior freelance day-rate equivalent, so interim retainer is the better commercial frame.

leads.name: Tide
leads.industry: Fintech / SME Business Banking (UK + India + Germany)
leads.fundingStage: Late-stage VC-backed (Apax Digital, Augmentum, LocalGlobe, etc.)
leads.compensationText: Not disclosed (UK fintech Head of Comms band typically £100-150K + equity FT; interim day-rate £800-1,200)
leads.employmentTypeRaw: Full-time (Head of Communications). Pitchable as interim during open search.
leads.notes: Combined 55, C grade. UK SME business-banking fintech with an active Head of Communications search. Sector fit is strong (fintech / financial services) but London hybrid expectation is the friction point for a US-anchored freelancer. The pitch here is interim coverage — Tide will spend 4-6 months recruiting a London-based Head of Comms, and the in-house team needs a senior interim during that window. ACTION: Light-touch outbound only — LinkedIn note to the CMO offering 2-3 days/week of remote interim coverage from US, anchored on US/transatlantic media work (FT, WSJ, American Banker, TechCrunch) so Mark's geography becomes an asset, not a liability. If they decline, this drops into the 'fintech-pipeline trends' watchlist for the next scrape.
